name: Chilled Cucumber Parsley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Light cream OR 1 cup milk
2 Medium seedless cucumbers, peeled and chopped
1 cup Finely chopped chives OR Green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the natural yogurt with the light cream (or milk) in a bowl.
2. Stir until smooth.
3. Add the heavy cream, cucumber, chives or green onions, and salt to the yogurt mixture.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
6. Before serving, garnish with thin slices of unpeeled cucumber.
7. Sprinkle a dash of paprika on top for color and flavor.
8. Serve chilled, ideally in individual bowls or glasses. This recipe serves 6 people.
